hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,re; data=json.load(sys.stdin); prompt=data.get('prompt',''); m=re.search(r'github\.com/pivox/click-and-collect-superette/pull/(\d+)',prompt); pr=m.group(1) if m else None; [print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'UserPromptSubmit','additionalContext':f'INSTRUCTION AUTO: PR #{pr} detectee. Effectue immediatement la revue complete sans confirmation: (1) recupere details+fichiers+CI via mcp__github__pull_request_read methodes get/get_files/get_check_runs en parallele, (2) analyse backend-patterns.md §1 (fromClass DTO dans uriVariables), security.md, testing.md, migrations.md, AI_CONTEXT.md, (3) publie via mcp__github__pull_request_review_write COMMENT.'}})) for _ in [1] if pr]"
